zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Insula於大約1290年出生在英國諾圖波藍德卡素 沃德時，她的父親John de Insula44歲，母親Agnes de Umfreville42歲。她於大約1322年與Roger de Burton在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。她去世於1347年3月12日在英國英格蘭越可爾享年58歲，埋葬在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Insula于大约1290年出生在英国諾圖波藍德卡素 沃德时，她的父亲John de Insula44岁，母亲Agnes de Umfreville42岁。她于大约1322年与Roger de Burton在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。她去世于1347年3月12日在英国英格兰越可爾享年58岁，埋葬在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Insula
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician: habitational name from any of the places called Insua, meaning ‘island, peninsula (of a river or of the sea), land by a river’, from Latin insula ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Insula was born about 1290, in Castle Ward, Northumberland, England, her father, John de Insula, was 44 and her mother, Agnes de Umfreville, was 42. She married Roger de Burton about 1322, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. She died on 12 March 1347, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Insula est née environ 1290, à Castle Ward, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, John de Insula, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Umfreville, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Burton environ 1322, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 12 mars 1347, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Everwyck, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Insulaが約1290年にイギリスノースウンバーランドカストル ワードで生まれた時，父John de Insulaは44歳，母Agnes de Umfrevilleは42歳であった。約1322年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでRoger de Burtonと結婚した。彼女は1347年3月12日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで58歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Insula(이)가 대략 1290년 영국 노르스벌랜드 카스틀 워드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Insula(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Umfreville(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 대략 1322년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Roger de Burton(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1347년 3월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Insula родилась около 1290 г. в местности кастл вард, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Insula было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Umfreville, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Burton около 1322 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла 12 марта 1347 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности еркшир, Англия.
